name: Tate & Lyle PLC
description: A global provider of specialty food and beverage ingredients including sweeteners, texturants, and dietary fibres. Transformed into a pure-play specialty ingredients business after the 2022 disposal of Primary Products.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Volume-led growth in specialty sweeteners and texturants, driven by health and wellness trends (sugar reduction, fibre fortification). Emerging market expansion, particularly in Asia.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Shift to higher-value specialty ingredients. Innovation pipeline driving mix improvement. Acquisition of CP Kelco (2024) adds high-margin pectin/cellulose gum business.
assumptions.risks: Raw material cost volatility (corn, tapioca), FX exposure (significant USD earnings), integration risk from CP Kelco acquisition, competitive pressure from Ingredion and ADM.
assumptions.catalyst: CP Kelco synergy realisation, new product launches in health-focused ingredients, emerging market growth, and potential further portfolio reshaping.
